articles.title: Ancient Snake with Legs Found!
articles.summary: Scientists found a very old snake fossil in Argentina. This snake lived almost 100 million years ago and had small back legs! Today's snakes don't have legs. The fossil also had a cheekbone that most snakes today don't have. This helps scientists learn how snakes changed over time. Long ago, people thought the first snakes were small and lived underground. But this fossil shows that early snakes were big and had big mouths. They kept their legs for a long time before losing them. Scientists used special X-rays to see inside the fossil without breaking it. They could see bones and even nerves inside the skull. This discovery helps us understand how snakes evolved.

articles.title: Old Dinosaur Footprints Found on Beach
articles.summary: Scientists found old dinosaur footprints on a beach in South Africa. The footprints are 132 million years old! That is a very long time ago. The footprints were found on rocks near the water. Some footprints are flat on the rock, and some are inside the cliffs. This is special because there are not many dinosaur footprints from that time in southern Africa. The place where they found the footprints is small, only as long as a swimming pool. But finding many footprints there means lots of dinosaurs lived in that area long ago. These are the youngest dinosaur footprints ever found in southern Africa. They help scientists learn more about dinosaurs that lived after big volcanic eruptions. The footprints were made by a kind of dinosaur called a theropod, which walked on two legs. This discovery is very exciting for scientists who study dinosaurs.

articles.title: Countries Meet to Talk About Moving Away from Fossil Fuels
articles.summary: Many countries are meeting in Colombia to talk about stopping the use of coal, oil, and gas. These fuels cause pollution and warm the Earth. The meeting is special because it is the first time countries are talking about completely moving away from these fuels. About 60 countries are there, including Colombia, Australia, and Nigeria. But big countries like the US, China, and India are not part of the talks. The meeting is happening because the United Nations climate meetings have been slow to make decisions. Scientists say the Earth is warming fast, and we need to act quickly. If the Earth gets too warm, we will have more dangerous weather like floods, fires, and heatwaves. The countries at the meeting want to show that many nations support clean energy like solar and wind power. They hope to encourage other countries to also switch to clean energy.

articles.title: Secret Rooms Found in Ancient Pyramid!
articles.summary: Scientists found two hidden empty spaces inside the Menkaure pyramid in Egypt. The pyramid is one of the famous pyramids at Giza. For a long time, people thought there might be a secret entrance on the east side. The scientists used special tools like radar and ultrasound to look inside the pyramid without breaking it. They found two empty rooms behind the stone wall. These rooms might be a secret entrance that no one knew about. The discovery is exciting because it helps us learn more about how the ancient Egyptians built the pyramids. The scientists are from universities in Egypt and Germany. They worked together on a project called ScanPyramids. This is not the first time they found something hidden. In 2023, they found a secret corridor in another pyramid. Now they hope to find out more about these hidden rooms.

articles.title: Making Tiny Wires Work Better
articles.summary: Scientists are studying tiny tubes called carbon nanotubes. They are very small and can carry electricity. But they are not as good as copper wires. Now, researchers in Spain found a way to make them carry more electricity. They added a special chemical to bundles of nanotubes. This made them 10 times better at carrying electricity. The best ones worked almost as well as copper. But after a while, they stopped working well. The scientists hope to find a way to make them last longer. If they can, these tiny wires could be used in many things like computers and phones.

articles.title: The Mystery of Big G
articles.summary: Scientists want to measure a number called Big G. Big G tells us how strong gravity is. Gravity is the force that keeps us on Earth and makes things fall. Even though we know about Big G for a long time, it is hard to measure it exactly. Different experiments give slightly different numbers. This is confusing for scientists. A group called NIST did a new experiment to try to get a better number. They used a special tool called a torsion balance. It has metal cylinders that twist when gravity pulls on them. They did the experiment with copper and sapphire masses and got the same result. But the new number still does not match other experiments. So the mystery of Big G continues. Scientists keep trying because knowing Big G helps us understand the universe better.
